response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his title and seniority (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceed the junior/mid-level scope, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and potential disengagement. His German language skill is minimal for a high on-site role in Berlin, and his focus on niche tech (DLang, custom tooling) may distract from pragmatic platform development.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js fullstack experience
Proven AWS and Docker/Kubernetes exposure in production systems
Demonstrated passion for clean architecture and teaching software best practices
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; risk of attrition or misalignment
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Excessive focus on experimental/legacy tech (DLang) may reduce focus on core platform
